description: Conceptual diagram illustrating a Minimum Mapping Unit (MMU) exception rule for objects located at the border of a riparian zone (RZ). The diagram shows a blue horizontal feature labelled "River", representing the riparian zone. This river is intersected by two vertical white features labelled "Roads". A red oval highlights the segment of the "River" located between the two "Roads", which is explicitly labelled "Area < 0,5 ha". This diagram demonstrates a scenario where a feature, specifically a segment of the river, has an area smaller than the standard 0.5 hectare Minimum Mapping Unit (MMU) but would still be mapped due to its location within a riparian zone, subject to specific mapping exception criteria.
